Headline: #50 Damen Temporary Northbound Reroute near Damen/Wellington
ShortDescription: Northbound 50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted via Damen, Diversey, Ashland, Belmont and Damen: due to, street blockage near Damen/Wellington.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted via Damen, Diversey, Ashland, Belmont and Damen: due to, street blockage near Damen/Wellington.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #111 111th/King Drive Temporary Reroute near 111th/Ashland
ShortDescription: 111 111th/King Drive  buses temp. rerouted : due to, street blockage near 111th/Ashland.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#111 111th/King Drive  buses temp. rerouted : due to, street blockage near 111th/Ashland.

Northbound buses will operate via Ashland, 1115th, Vincennes, Monterey, Hamlet and 111th including the normal route streets.

Southbound  buses will operate via 111th, Marshfield, Monterey, Vincennes and 1115th.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Red Line Service Delayed near Harrison
ShortDescription: Red Line trains are standing near Harrison due to an unauthorized person on the tracks. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line trains are standing near Harrison due to an unauthorized person on the tracks.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
